title: eleocharis exigua
intro: Eleocharis exigua, also known as the dwarf spike-rush, is a small, aquatic plant that belongs to the sedge family (Cyperaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eleocharis exigua include its potential to aid in the treatment of respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
